content.p: Nothing in this division shall be construed to prohibit:
Any notice or advertisement prescribed or required by law, or any notice posted by any lawful officer.
Any directional warning or information signs or structures required or authorized by law or by federal, state, county or city authority.
A sign advertising a sale or lease of the building or premises upon which it is located.
The name of the person occupying a building or premises, and the type of business conducted by such person.
